title: ITIL 4 Awareness
description:
ITIL® is the world's leading best practice framework for implementing IT service management. Organizations use ITIL to plan, implement, support, and improve services and create value for their customers. In this course, you will learn the foundational knowledge and skills for adopting and adapting best practices for IT service management (ITSM) in your organization.

This course is designed for anyone who would like a bird’s eye view of IT Service Management, its principles and practices, and how it will help you deliver better value to your customers. It is appropriate for all IT staff and management of organizations who work closely with IT to support business requirements.

In this course, you will identify the components of the ITL 4 framework and describe key service management concepts.
